response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership in open-source and knowledge-sharing, but lacks explicit evidence of people management and organizational change leadership, which are critical for this engineering productivity manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record in open-source tooling and technical mentorship through workshops and talks
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and infrastructure with demonstrable system design skills
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical contributions
Lacks explicit experience with mobile platform ecosystems or large-scale build/testing infrastructure
Minimal documentation of roadmap planning or cross-team alignment in prior roles
